USM Temic JR95-J96-L38-L43 SW0832

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 74D
Recv ID: 76D
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 27
Func Name: UPC

    "minbytes": 2,
    "replybytes": "50C0",
    "sentbytes": "10C0",
    "name": "Start Diagnostic Session",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {

        "firstbyte": 2
      }

  },

    "replybytes": "6101",
